title: El supersabio
writer: Jean Bernard-Luc, Alex Joffé, Íñigo de Martino
actors: Cantinflas, Perla Aguiar, Carlos Martínez Baena
plot: Cantinflas is the apprentice of a renowned scientist, Prof. Arquimides Monteagudo (Carlos Martinez Baena). But Cantinflas has the soul of a poet rather than a serious researcher, and he wants to find the formula that achieves the ...
